title: rubus weiheanus
intro: Rubus weiheanus, also known as Weihe's Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to China. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus weiheanus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially aiding in the management of certain types of cancer. Rubus weiheanus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
